item.title: Money can’t buy this kind of happiness
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: As long as the work gets done, I don't care how long you're on-site. Monitor chats from homr and relax :)
item.description: I'm an engineering manager in the semiconductor industry. I'm only 30 years old and the youngest manager by 15 years at my fab. My departments are also the most reliable and efficient with the best team dynamic. My secret is treating all engineers and technicians with empathy and respect and always accommodating their needs. Prior to being the manager, I was the engineer so thankfully am able to perform preventive and corrective maintenance on tools while engineers and techs are enjoying their lives
item.dc:creator: Longdickjohnson69

item.title: “So I hired myself” got me. Always count on you!
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
beautiful
nobody gets in the way of my snacks
much, much more
purple easily. even though my ears are fucked from years of playing shows/band practices
relatable, sadly
well that’s unsettling
finally some good news
also i'm not a giant tool
the good stuff
accurate
mmm hmm
how it do that?
go ahead and disregard this meme gang
we've all been there
wobble wobble
sounds amazing
that's it for me.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: AllAnusMorissette

item.title: Images of Note: Just kidding pond fish
item.description:
Sometimes I feel so powerful how people believe I am part of the downfall of civilization.
He's right and we should say it. His name is Oliver Frederick Fenton Spring.
"They hired actors to die for this attack!!" "Why would they hire actors when they could just kill a whole lot of people, these are the fuckers who installed Pinochet, you think they wouldn't kill a whole load of kids?"
Oh come now, Boris Badenov and Natasha Fatale were *far* more competent than Donald Trump.
I mean basically.
All Hail.
The Blog Bog.
I googled "Christ Worshipping Disorder" and I wish I didn't.
nyoom
1920s children's book TADC. The Amazing Analogue Circus
Catbus
Stardew Valley is a very special game and I'm always very tempted to date Abigail.
The idea of letting Elon Musk near my brainparts elicits the same reaction as pouring a Moka pot of coffee fresh from the stove on my genitals does.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Mostly dnd memes
item.description: Hello lovely people. we are looking for friends for a dnd server. We have plenty of DMs working together on multiple stories and a lot of games from one shots, giant encounters to longer campaigns. We have a tavern for RP, memes and art. https://discord.gg/zYD7msNW

item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: As a Field Biologist Myself, Can Agree
item.description:
Just got done in Kentucky evaluating forested habitats for endangered bats species...weather was rough from cold to really warm and lots of rain. Despite all the rain gear I brought, I was absolutely drenched head to toe after 8 hours in it. Also, with permission from the landowner, I found this skull and dragged it back to my car...I was kind of relieved that it was getting dark and can't imagine any drivers passing by on the road seeing me hauling this thing over the hill...I tried to be cryptid I guess in hopes no one asked me questions lol. It's going to a very beloved animal/nature nerd friend of mine who also loves anything horse related. Can say she's super stoked she's getting this to add to her collection of skulls! But yes, feral biologists, I am very ecstatic about my job and the random fieldwork I do!
It's as big as me! I don't have a banana for scale, but I do have my German potato self to compare!!

item.title: Mostly positive, uplifting, or absurd/funny memes for you.
item.description:
Your compassion is incomplete if it does not include yourself.
Honesty and integrity towards yourself.
Don’t worry about what other people think of you because most of the time they are thinking of themselves.
Ha!
I love chiral chemistry. Ask me about isomeric vs. racemic medications and patents.
I want to ride my bicycle.
Just funny.
Pop culture is both incredible and tiring at the same time.
I tried this, it didn’t work as planned.
True.
This! Don’t overthink.
Awww. Doggo.
I have a great group of friends that have been my family for decades.
Yep.
I use these.
Try hepatology and herpetology. There is a joke there as well.
So true.
Holley
I have handed out this advice frequently. It is very cool when it works.
And you will never look at the concert videos you took. Be present.
Focus and determination.
Ha.
I feel this everyday.
item.dc:creator: Eisingrumble

item.title: Sunday Service
item.description: As the sign says! This is the third try for this dump, I've already deleted a dumpload that I thought was already uploaded off my phone, but nevermind, the meme hunt continues!
item.dc:creator: bubblegumfaerie

item.title: Meme Dump part 6 out of 200
item.description:
Happy Sunday everyone ♡
If you're new here
I'm cleaning out my 11k+ meme Dump folder
On my phone
From 2017
And it recommends
That I add a description
To every image
Which
I suck at
So I just ramble
A lot
On one of my past posts
I mentioned
A great
Zombie movie
Called
Train to Busan
11/10 recommend
Someone in the comments
Brought up
A zombie
TV show
Which is also
Incredibly amazing
Called
All Of Us Are Dead
On Netflix
It's been a bit since I've seen it
And im happy that I still
Love it as much as the
First time watching it
If you haven't
Seen it
And love Zombies
Please please watch it
Yesterday was my friends
Birthday party
And we played a bunch
Of online group games
Like Lethal Company and
JackBox
Today I'm taking
The core group of us
Into VRChat
And we're going to
Explore this haunted house
Where a monster is hunting you the entire time
I'm scared but excited
Thanks for joining me on another 11k meme folder phone cleaning dump. Hope everyone had a good weekend and gets lots of rest tonight ♡
item.dc:creator: Orangefish
